decision.allowed_next_step: Use Ramanujan-OI path normalizer as a strong clue; next freeze must derive a true no-anchor scale or a muon-specific generation channel from existing non-mass sources.
decision.denied_next_step: Claiming charged-lepton masses derived or declaring Debt 9 closed.

formula.mass_diagnostic: m_i(v5.3) = m_i(v5.2 sealed) * R_ei; m_e unchanged

frozen_formula.name: RamanujanOIPathNormalizer_v5_3
frozen_formula.role: root-relative charged-lepton generation normalizer applied to the already sealed v5.2 kernel

source.information_operator: OIB = ln2/(24*pi), used as the quantum of informational preference fluctuation
source.path_rule: spinor half-action divided by generation-path duration from e to target
source.ramanujan_layer: v2.1/v2.9 seed suppression and tau_v2 table

metrics.closure_threshold_policy: Denied: electron is still unit anchor; formula was introduced after v5.2 diagnosis; muon error remains large enough to block canon closure.

source_assertions.information_operator_role: OIB=ln2/(24*pi) as quantum of informational preference fluctuation from v2.9 and step-docs.
source_assertions.ramanujan_visibility_definition: visibility = exp(-ramanujan_scaled_action / OIB) from v2.1 script/results.
source_assertions.spinor_half_path_rule: half-action amplitude over root-relative generation path, consistent with short-doc half-phase/lifted closure convention.

taint_ledger.benchmark_targets: Used only after formula fingerprint for scoring.
taint_ledger.electron_unit_anchor: Still inherited from prior unit convention; blocks no-parameter closure.
taint_ledger.post_v5_2_formula_selection: This normalizer was installed after noticing the missing Ramanujan/OI layer; useful diagnostic, not independent blind prediction.
